name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Stops grabbing the wrong show. Indexers loose-match, so a search could return unrelated releases (e.g. JoJo/Iseyuru for Adventure Time). DebridHub now verifies each result actually matches the requested title and exact season+episode (or year for movies) before grabbing, and logs when results were found but none matched.
